title: garlicky velvety croatian mascarpone bake
description: A light and creamy dessert featuring the flavors of Croatia.

ingredients.name: granulated sugar
ingredients.notes: make sure to use real sugar for the best flavor

ingredients.name: plain flour
ingredients.notes: use all-purpose flour for a tender crumb

ingredients.name: salt
ingredients.notes: a pinch, but necessary for flavor

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the mascarpone cheese and granulated sugar.
Beat the eggs in a separate bowl, then add them to the mascarpone mixture.
Sift the flour over the mixture and gently fold until just combined.
Add the softened butter and mix until a smooth batter forms.
Stir in the minced garlic and a pinch of salt.
Pour the batter into a greased 8-inch round baking pan.
Bake for 35 minutes or until the edges are lightly golden brown.
Remove from the oven and sprinkle with lemon zest.
Allow the bake to cool in the pan for 5 minutes before transferring it to a wire rack.
